description_long: This house features a striking combination of a tall, steeply pitched A-frame roof and a modern rectangular section, creating a visually dynamic structure. The front facade includes a driveway with a parked car, a small garden with trees, and a prominent entryway with large windows and a glass door. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, enclosed by low walls for privacy. The exterior is finished in dark gray with white trim, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The house appears to have two above-ground stories, with the upper level partially open to the roofline. The landscaping is minimal but well-maintained, with grass lawns and a few ornamental trees.
description: A modern two-story house with a dramatic A-frame roof, dark gray exterior, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entryway with glass door, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall A-frame roof, side windows, and the transition between the rectangular and triangular sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and open outdoor space with fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the full height of the A-frame roof, rear lawn, and driveway entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, wide steps, and a small porch area with landscaping and large windows.
